title: platystele compacta
intro: Platystele compacta, also known as the compact epiphytic orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to Central and South America. This epiphytic orchid has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Platystele compacta include its ability to help manage fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by boiling its roots and leaves in water, or by making a tincture with ethanol to create a liquid extract.
intro_study: According to "Physiology and molecular biology of plants : an international journal of functional plant biology", platystele compacta benefits from the addition of Cuscuta campestris extract to the culture medium, which increased somatic embryo maturation and transformation efficiency.
